_comment: Phase 69 Plan 05 (REG-03) initial linux-x86_64 thresholds. Values captured from the Phase 59 motivating-incident CI runs (GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest, runs 24282224300 and 24273837832) and the existing per-benchmark config.json `rationale` strings committed during the 2026-04-11 cross-platform reconciliation. This file currently only lists the four benchmarks that drifted across macOS-arm64 vs Linux-x86_64; the full per-benchmark audit can be captured in a follow-up commit once `scripts/bench_audit.sh --platform linux-x86_64 5` is re-run on an ubuntu-latest runner and this file is overwritten. DO NOT hand-edit individual benchmark entries after a real audit lands — regenerate via the script. Schema: each entry in `thresholds` has numeric max_ratio, mean_ratio, stddev_ratio, variance_pct, runs_n.
